heading: Case Studies
intro: Real projects, real results — see how we have helped Pahang businesses modernise their operations with the right technology.

items.title: Mentakab Mall Network Architecture Design & Deployment
items.desc: Designed and deployed a scalable enterprise network for Mentakab Mall — covering structured cabling, VLAN segmentation, Wi-Fi 6 access points, and a centralised management dashboard.

items.title: Custom Sales2DO Plugin for AutoCount Accounting
items.desc: Built a bespoke Sales2DO module extending AutoCount's core — enabling automated order-to-delivery-order conversion, real-time stock updates, and approval workflows for a Pahang distributor.

items.title: AutoCount ERP Integration for a Temerloh Food Manufacturer
items.desc: Integrated AutoCount Accounting with a production planning module for a local food manufacturer, synchronising raw-material procurement, batch costing, and finished-goods inventory in real time.

items.title: Smart Warehouse Networking & Barcode System for Kuantan Logistics Firm
items.desc: Deployed an industrial-grade wireless mesh network across a 20,000 sq ft warehouse, integrated with AutoCount's inventory module and handheld barcode scanners for real-time stock accuracy.
